Project Spotlight

Luxury Villa Interior — Asokoro

A full interior overhaul for a private residence, combining bespoke joinery, natural stone finishes and a curated furniture palette.

LocationAsokoro, Abuja
Duration14 weeks
ServicesInterior design, finishing, furnishing
Completed2025

Outcome: A cohesive, liveable interior delivered on schedule, with the client commissioning a second property with us the following year.
